title: WebReg2Cal
description: A Chrome extension that converts UCSD WebReg schedules into a calendar-friendly format for easier planning and organization.

title: Playoff Win Predictor
description: A data-driven baseball analysis project that predicts playoff game outcomes using historical trends, team statistics, and analytical modeling.

title: The Snowballing Effect
description: A predictive analytics project exploring how small early-game advantages can grow over time and influence final match outcomes.

title: Data Dashboard Mockup
description: A concept dashboard project focused on turning raw datasets into readable visual summaries.

title: Campus Event Tracker
description: A project concept for organizing campus events and presenting schedules in a simple, user-friendly layout.

title: Visualization Study
description: An exploratory project for testing chart choices, visual encodings, and communication clarity.

title: Portfolio Redesign Concept
description: A redesign concept for a personal site with stronger hierarchy and better responsive behavior.

title: Assignment Tracker
description: A planner prototype that helps students organize coursework deadlines across multiple classes.

title: Movie Trends Explorer
description: A small data app idea for comparing genres, ratings, and popularity over time.

title: Fitness Log Visualizer
description: A concept tool for plotting workout consistency and progress with simple visual summaries.

title: Recipe Recommendation Tool
description: A meal planning concept that suggests recipes based on ingredients and dietary preferences.

title: Classroom Sentiment Snapshot
description: A concept project for summarizing anonymous student feedback into quick sentiment insights.
